flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Northeast Alabama Community College fell 58% between 2009 and 2010 (37.4% → 15.9%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Northeast Alabama Community College rose 19% between 2017 and 2020 ($5.1k → $6.1k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Northeast Alabama Community College fell 15% between 2007 and 2010 (32.9% → 27.9%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Northeast Alabama Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.8% → 0.0%).
